---
title: "Jornadas de SIG Libre: A European Digital Mapping Conference"
description: "Robin Lovelace (2014). Jornadas de SIG Libre: A European Digital Mapping Conference. *Geoinformatics*."
date: "2014-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_jornadas_2014"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Geoinformatics"
doi: ""
publication-url: "http://fluidbook.geoinformatics.com/GEO-Informatics_4_2014/#/12/"
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
abstract: "This report provides an overview of the \"Jornadas de SIG Libre\" conference, highlighting key themes and developments in open-source geographic information systems and digital mapping."
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Geoinformatics
**Year:** 2014

[URL](http://fluidbook.geoinformatics.com/GEO-Informatics_4_2014/#/12/) [BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Abstract

This report provides an overview of the "Jornadas de SIG Libre" conference, highlighting key themes and developments in open-source geographic information systems and digital mapping.

## Citation

Robin Lovelace (2014). Jornadas de SIG Libre: A European Digital Mapping Conference. *Geoinformatics*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_jornadas_2014,
	title = {Jornadas de {SIG} {Libre}: {A} {European} {Digital} {Mapping} {Conference}},
	volume = {17},
	copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication},
	url = {http://fluidbook.geoinformatics.com/GEO-Informatics_4_2014/#/12/},
	abstract = {This report provides an overview of the "Jornadas de SIG Libre" conference, highlighting key themes and developments in open-source geographic information systems and digital mapping.},
	number = {4},
	journal = {Geoinformatics},
	author = {Lovelace, Robin},
	year = {2014},
	pages = {12--12},
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
